summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: 1) Mobile fixed bottom buttons for recipe form, 2) Recipe edit functionality, 3) Save YouTube Recipe feature. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when called without auth token instead of 401/403

issues: Fixed bottom buttons have z-index: 50 while bottom navigation has z-index: 100. Buttons are still functional but could be partially obscured in some edge cases.

passed_tests: GET /api/youtube/video-details/{video_id} - Returns video metadata with auth
GET /api/youtube/video-details/{video_id} - Returns 404 for invalid video ID
POST /api/recipes/youtube - Creates YouTube-linked recipe successfully
POST /api/recipes/youtube - Rejects duplicate video for same household
YouTube recipe appears in household recipes list with recipe_type='youtube'
PUT /api/recipes/{id} - Updates recipe with new title, ingredients, instructions
Recipe has household_id for ownership verification
YouTube URL regex validates youtube.com, youtu.be, shorts, embed formats
GET /api/recipes/tags - Returns 12 recipe tags with translations
GET /api/recipes/units - Returns 10 unit options
GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients - Requires auth
GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients - Returns suggestions with auth
GET /api/recipes - Returns household recipes list
GET /api/recipes/community - Returns published community recipes
POST /api/recipes - Creates recipe with auto-translation
GET /api/recipes/{id} - Returns recipe details with stock status
DELETE /api/recipes/{id} - Deletes recipe successfully
POST /api/recipes/{id}/like - Increments likes for published recipes
POST /api/recipes/{id}/add-missing-to-shopping - Adds missing items to shopping list
Frontend: YouTube button visible in Recipes page header
Frontend: YouTube Recipe Saver sheet opens with URL input
Frontend: Video preview loads when YouTube URL entered
Frontend: Categories and Personal Note sections available
Frontend: Save to Cookbook button enabled after video loads
Frontend: Edit button visible in recipe detail view for own recipes
Frontend: Recipe Creator form opens with all fields
Frontend: Fixed bottom buttons (Cancel/Save) are position:fixed with bottom:0
Frontend: Save button clickable on mobile (y=780 in 844px viewport)
Frontend: Recipe creation successful on mobile with toast confirmation
critical_code_review_comments: z-index hierarchy: Bottom nav (z-100) > Fixed buttons (z-50). Consider increasing fixed button z-index to 110 for better layering.
YouTube video-details endpoint should return 401 instead of 500 when auth is missing for better error handling.
seed_data_creation: Created test recipes: 'Test Mobile Recipe', multiple TEST_ prefixed YouTube recipes (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: 1) Mobile fixed buttons - position:fixed, bottom:0, z-50, clickable at y=780 in 844px viewport. 2) Edit functionality - edit button appears in recipe detail view for own recipes, PUT /api/recipes/{id} works. 3) YouTube Recipe Saver - GET /api/youtube/video-details/{video_id} returns metadata, POST /api/recipes/youtube creates recipe with recipe_type='youtube'. Test user: recipe_tester@test.com / TestPass123!

mobile_fixed_buttons.details: Buttons are position:fixed, bottom:0, z-index:50. Clickable and functional on mobile viewport (390x844).

recipe_edit.details: Edit button (pencil icon) appears in recipe detail view for household's own recipes. PUT /api/recipes/{id} updates all fields correctly.

youtube_recipe_saver.details: YouTube button in header opens sheet. URL input accepts various YouTube formats. Video details fetched via GET /api/youtube/video-details/{video_id}. Recipe saved via POST /api/recipes/youtube with recipe_type='youtube'.
